title: raw_77_nanobot_l6_handoff_v1 — hexa-bio L6 emission contract
description: N-R2 hexa-bio-side L6 single-machine-kinetics emission to therapeutic-nanobot consumer. Lands draft from .roadmap.nanobot §STALLED N-R2 (line 95). Therapeutic-nanobot acceptance side (raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_acceptance_v1) is defined in canon canonical session per memory/feedback_cross_repo_canonical.md and is intentionally out of scope here.

actuator_id.description: Reference to actuator_output_v1 actuator_id (must match upstream raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v2 emission).

l6_layer.description: hexa-bio NANOBOT scope = atoms-level single-molecule architectural primitive (L0..L6).

expected_consumer_layers.description: Layers therapeutic-nanobot adds on top (clinical-application system). Schema lock pending external session.

joint_witness_path.description: Co-authored handshake JSON path per N-R2 line 37 spec.

emission_blocked_until_schema_lock.description: hexa-bio repo blocks live emission until therapeutic-nanobot acceptance schema is locked in canon canonical session. v0 status.
